title: Registry_Style
text: Registry_Style Controls the position of logical printers in the Microsoft Windows registry. Registry_Style { = } BY_VERSION | BY_APSNAME Arguments BY_VERSION —default, if Registry_Style is not specified. The resulting registry entry is: HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Uniface/Uniface Version BY_APSNAME —key the registry by application name. The resulting registry entry is: HKEY_CURRENT_USER/Software/Uniface/Uniface Version /logprinter/ ApsName Default value BY_VERSION File section [printer] When you use Registry_Style = BY_APSNAME , an extra copy of the registry key will be placed in the default position. This is a result of the default behavior that moves all registry settings to the default location. These extra logical printer keys do not influence run-time behavior. Related Links [printer] The [printer] section of the initialization file defines the fonts used for printing, and logical printer definitions. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
